name: oracle
description: Ask ChatGPT Pro from Codex through the user's logged-in Chrome session.

interface.longDescription: Use Computer Use to operate the user's logged-in Chrome ChatGPT session, select a Pro or extended-thinking model, ask one focused second-opinion prompt, and summarize the useful answer back into Codex.
defaultPrompt: Ask Oracle for a second opinion
Run this decision by ChatGPT Pro
Use Oracle to sanity-check this implementation
